title: T-020 — Server Action: setCoreFlag with V-SET-42/V-SET-43/V-SET-44 server-side enforcement
prompt:
# T-020 — Server Action: setCoreFlag with V-SET-42/V-SET-43/V-SET-44

## Goal
Core feature flag flip with backend-only preflight enforcement for D365 and Settings/Auth workflow gates.

V-SET-42 = `integration.d365.enabled=true` requires 5 d365_constants rows populated plus V-SET-50/V-SET-52 test connection pass (call D365 constants/test-connection Server Action from T-030; SM-08/T-054 is UI-only).

V-SET-43 = `npd.post_release_edit.enabled=true` requires enabled `org_authorization_policies.policy_code='npd_post_release_edit'`, at least one authorizer permission/role, and `requires_new_version=true`.

V-SET-44 = `technical.product_spec_approval.required=true` requires enabled `org_authorization_policies.policy_code='technical_product_spec_approval'`, `approval_gate_rule_code='technical_product_spec_approval_gate_v1'`, `min_approvers>=1`, and satisfiable Technical approver permissions.

For other non-D365/non-workflow flags, only RBAC + audit are needed.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/actions/flags/set-core.ts
- apps/web/actions/flags/set-core.test.ts

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given `integration.d365.enabled=true`, when D365 constants/test connection preflight fails, then the flag remains unchanged and a typed V-SET-42 error is returned.
- Given `npd.post_release_edit.enabled=true`, when the NPD authorization policy is missing, disabled, lacks authorizer roles/permissions, or has `requires_new_version=false`, then the flag remains unchanged and a typed V-SET-43 error is returned.
- Given `technical.product_spec_approval.required=true`, when the Technical approval policy is missing, disabled, has the wrong/missing gate rule, `min_approvers<1`, or unsatisfiable approver permissions, then the flag remains unchanged and a typed V-SET-44 error is returned.
- Given all relevant preflights pass, then the flag flips, audit log row is written via trigger, and outbox event is emitted.
- Enforcement is server-side in `setCoreFlag`; UI affordances from T-065/T-122 may display preflight results but cannot be the source of truth.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: D365 fail, V-SET-43 missing/misconfigured policy, V-SET-44 wrong gate/min approver, maintenance success, audit/outbox success.
- GREEN: implement by calling T-030 D365 service and T-122 authorization-policy helper/preflight.
- Run targeted vitest, typecheck, lint.

## Risk red lines
- Do not flip `integration.d365.enabled` without all V-SET-42/V-SET-50/V-SET-52 guards.
- Do not flip `npd.post_release_edit.enabled` without V-SET-43 policy validation.
- Do not flip `technical.product_spec_approval.required` without V-SET-44 policy/gate validation.
- Do not depend on T-054/T-065/T-122 UI logic for flag preflight; backend guard is canonical.
- Do not implement NPD or Technical application workflows in this task.

pipeline_inputs.description: Core feature flag flip with backend preflight for D365 and Settings/Auth workflow gates.
pipeline_inputs.details:
V-SET-42 guards integration.d365.enabled. V-SET-43 guards npd.post_release_edit.enabled via org_authorization_policies npd_post_release_edit. V-SET-44 guards technical.product_spec_approval.required via org_authorization_policies technical_product_spec_approval and technical_product_spec_approval_gate_v1. setCoreFlag is the server-side source of truth.
Preserved acceptance requirements: Audit log row written via trigger.; Outbox event emitted.
acceptance_criteria: NPD V-SET-43 and Technical V-SET-44 preflights enforced via T-126 without T-020↔T-122 cycle.
Audit log and outbox row written once per successful flag change.
Tests cover allow, deny, audit/outbox and no partial update.
test_strategy: RED: D365 fail, V-SET-43 policy fail, V-SET-44 gate fail, maintenance success, audit/outbox success.
GREEN: implement helper calls and typed errors.
risk_red_lines: Do not flip integration.d365.enabled without all guards.
Do not flip npd.post_release_edit.enabled without V-SET-43 policy validation.
Do not flip technical.product_spec_approval.required without V-SET-44 policy/gate validation.
Do not depend on UI modal/screen logic for pre-flight; backend guard is canonical.
Do not implement NPD or Technical application workflows.
